---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a feature or enhancement for a future release
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: savevsgames
---

## Problem statement

What problem does this feature solve? What pain point are you hitting that a feature would address?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you'd like to see. What should it do? How should it work from the user's perspective?

## Alternatives considered

Have you tried other approaches? What workarounds exist right now?

## Which tier does this fit in?

- [ ] Tier 1 — Prep & Lookup (relay + /napoleon + basic commands)
- [ ] Tier 2 — Live Assistance (NPC dialogue, tactical hints, mid-session notes)
- [ ] Tier 3 — Active Co-GM (tactical NPC combat, scene management)
- [ ] Not sure / cross-cutting

## Game system scope

- [ ] Pathfinder 2nd Edition (pf2e) — primary
- [ ] Shadowdark RPG — second system target
- [ ] Other system: ___________
- [ ] System-agnostic

## Additional context

Screenshots, mockups, links to similar features in other tools, or any other context that helps explain the request.
